data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Insurance requirement verification', but there is no evidence provided that confirms the enforcement or verification of the insurance certificate requirement. The linked use case mentions that an insurance certificate is required two weeks before the event, but there are no API reads or persisted state checks that demonstrate this requirement has been satisfied. This indicates a clear gap in the validation process.
gaps: No evidence confirming enforcement of insurance requirement verification.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
